title: Chipa Chibwe  (Suing in his capacity s Chairman of the Outdoor Advertising Association of Zambia) v Lusaka City Council (2024/CCZ/007) [2024] ZMCC 26 (5 November 2024)
case_name: Chipa Chibwe  (Suing in his capacity s Chairman of the Outdoor Advertising Association of Zambia) v Lusaka City Council
issue_tags: Extension of time under Order XV, rule 7 CCR
Discretionary relief for filing out of time
Inadvertent misunderstanding of orally pronounced date as sufficient ground
outcome_detail: Court granted extension to file a reply, finding an inadvertent date misunderstanding and no prejudice to the applicant
